html:
Exclusive to:

The Briar Wolf is a hostile Mob exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama update. Briar Wolves spawn from briars disturbed by the player. They serve as a source of Costumes needed for Stage performances, which they drop upon death.

Though they normally only spawn from Briars, Briar Wolves are also created by the stage itself if players try to start the show during a closed curtain or if players initiate a performance without wearing the required costume(s). The stage will summon three wolves, which drop various loot when they die:

Sets Items
Miner
Gardener
Fisherman
Tourist
Hunter
Meteorologist
Tailor

Contents

  • 1 Briar
  • 2 Year of the Clockwork Knight
  • 3 Fighting Strategy
  • 4 Gallery

Briar

Briar Setpiece

Briars are Plants in Don't Starve Together. They are part of a unique Set Piece in which four of them surround the Overgrown Statue. When harvested or attacked, the Briar transforms into a Briar Wolf. Briars will respawn after one in-game day.

Briars deal 1 damage when harvested.

Year of the Clockwork Knight

Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight

During the Year of the Clockwork Knight event, after the player makes an offering to the Clockwork Knight Shrine, when the player comes close to the Stage it will spawn 5 Briar Wolves. When they are killed, they drop the Red Pouch and Princess Costume, and, if the player does not have the playbill My Knights Four and I yet, they will also drop one.

At the Briar Set Piece, 2 additional Briar Wolves respawn with other 4 Briar Wolves. Those 2 will drop the Princess Costume when killed.

Fighting Strategy

Below is the number of hits it takes with each weapon to kill a Briar Wolf when playing with characters with a default damage modifier. The Weather Pain, Brightshade Staff, and Bee Mine are not included due to their random natures. This table does not take into account the damage bonus gained from characters with a lunar or shadow affinity. It also does not take into account the 40% damage bonus Wendy gets from attacking the same mob as Abigail, Wanda's damage bonus with Shadow weapons (except for the Alarming Clock, which does accurately reflect that bonus), or Wolfgang's damage multiplier when he isn't mighty.

"hedgehound"
Exclusive to:
“It's an ambush!”
–Wilson
“Ugh, you sneaky jerk!!”
–Willow
“Is plant or puppy? Wolfgang is confused!”
–Wolfgang
“Its beauty hid the beast within.”
–Wendy
“ORGANIC TRICKERY!”
–WX-78
“Ah. That would explain the respiration.”
–Wickerbottom
“Ready to do some pruning, Luce?”
–Woodie
“The critics here will really eat you alive.”
–Maxwell
“Deceiver! Thou art a prickly pöx upön my stage!”
–Wigfrid
“Did we say something wrong?!”
–Webber
“Alors, some things in life are not as rosy as they seem.”
–Warly
“Why friends mad?”
–Wormwood
“You're gettin' to be a real thorn in my side!”
–Winona
“You wouldn't eat a fellow trickster, would you?”
–Wortox
“Sneaky doggy! Bad!”
–Wurt
“Maybe he just has a thorn stuck in his paw?”
–Walter
“Fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice, shame on you again!”
–Wanda

"hedgehound_bush"
“It's a bush.”
–Wilson
“Those roses will look so pretty as they're burning.”
–Willow
“Full of prickles.”
–Wolfgang
“They're... beautiful.”
–Wendy
“THERE IS SOMETHING INSIDE”
–WX-78
“How odd. This rose bush appears to be... breathing.”
–Wickerbottom
“Roses grow awfully fast around these parts.”
–Woodie
“Nice try.”
–Maxwell
“A thörny bramble.”
–Wigfrid
“Look at all those pretty red roses.”
–Webber
“Ah, la vie en rose.”
–Warly
“Friends?”
–Wormwood
“Why am I gettin' a bad feeling...”
–Winona
“Did those vines just whine? I'm sure it's fine.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, it full of ugly flowers.”
–Wurt
“Woby, what's wrong? It's just a rose bush!”
–Walter
“Was that rosebush there a second ago?”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Briar Wolf là một Mob thù địch độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together. Nó đã được thêm vào trong bản cập nhật A Little Drama. Sói Briar sinh ra từ những cây tầm xuân bị người chơi quấy rầy. Chúng phục vụ như một nguồn cung cấp Trang phục cần thiết cho các buổi biểu diễn trên Sân khấu mà chúng rơi ra khi chết.

Fool me twice, shame on you again! |choose = wolfgang}} The '''Briar Wolf''' is a hostile [[Mobs|Mob]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It was added in ''[[A Little Drama and QOL|A Little Drama]]'' update. Briar Wolves spawn from briars disturbed by the player. They serve as a source of [[Costumes]] needed for [[Stage]] performances, which they drop upon death. Though they normally only spawn from Briars, Briar Wolves are also created by the stage itself if players try to start the show during a closed curtain or if players initiate a performance without wearing the required costume(s). The stage will summon three wolves, which drop various loot when they die: {| class="wikitable" !Sets !Items |- |Miner |{{pic32|Pickaxe}}{{pic32|Miner Hat}}{{pic32|Light Bulb}} |- |Gardener |{{pic32|Watering Can}}{{pic32|Garden Hoe}}{{pic32|Garden Digamajig}} |- |Fisherman |{{pic32|Sea Fishing Rod}}{{pic32|Wooden Ball Bobber}}{{pic32|Sunrise Spoon}} |- |Tourist |{{pic32|Axe}}{{pic32|Backpack}}{{pic32|Shovel}} |- |Hunter |{{pic32|Spear}}{{pic32|Grass Suit}}{{pic32|Trap}} |- |Meteorologist |{{pic32|Rabbit Earmuff}}{{pic32|Jerky}}{{pic32|Umbrella}} |- |Tailor |{{pic32|Top Hat}}{{pic32|Sewing Kit}}{{pic32|Pretty Parasol}} |} __TOC__{{Clear}} ==Briar== {{Object Infobox |name = Briar |picked = Can be picked([[File:Petals.png|24px|link=Petals]] & {{Pic32|Briar Wolf}}) |image = Briar.png |perk = Deals 1 damage to player when picked |renew = Yes |biome = |spawnCode = "hedgehound_bush"}} {{Quotes |wilson = It's a bush. |willow = Those roses will look so pretty as they're burning. |wolfgang = Full of prickles. |wendy = They're... beautiful. |wx78 = THERE IS SOMETHING INSIDE |wickerbottom = How odd. This rose bush appears to be... breathing. |woodie = Roses grow awfully fast around these parts. |maxwell = Nice try. |wigfrid = A thörny bramble. |webber = Look at all those pretty red roses. |warly = Ah, la vie en rose. |wormwood = Friends? |winona = Why am I gettin' a bad feeling... |wortox = Did those vines just whine? I'm sure it's fine. |wurt = Glurgh, it full of ugly flowers. |walter = Woby, what's wrong? It's just a rose bush! |wanda = Was that rosebush there a second ago? |choose = wickerbottom}} [[File:Briar Setpiece.jpg|200px|thumb|left|Briar Setpiece]] '''Briars''' are [[Plants]] in ''Don't Starve Together''. They are part of a unique [[Set Piece/DST|Set Piece]] in which four of them surround the [[Overgrown Statue]]. When harvested or attacked, the Briar transforms into a Briar Wolf. Briars will respawn after one in-game day. Briars deal 1 damage when harvested. {{Clear}} ==Year of the Clockwork Knight== {{Event|Year of the Clockwork Knight}} During the '''Year of the Clockwork Knight''' event, after the player makes an offering to the [[Clockwork Knight Shrine]], when the player comes close to the [[Stage]] it will spawn 5 Briar Wolves. When they are killed, they drop the [[Lucky_Gold_Nugget#Clockwork Knight's Red Pouch|Red Pouch]] and [[Princess Costume]], and, if the player does not have the playbill [[My Knights Four and I]] yet, they will also drop one. At the Briar Set Piece, 2 additional Briar Wolves respawn with other 4 Briar Wolves. Those 2 will drop the Princess Costume when killed. == {{Pic32|Spear}} Fighting Strategy== {{Weapon Hits DST|health=50|icestaff=2|sleepdart=4}} =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== RWP ALD Briar Wolf concept art1.png|Briar Wolf concept art from Rhymes With Play stream.
